title: The 'Turbo Cancer' Claim Is Wrong. But the Real Story Is More Unsettling.
description: Cancer cases crossed 2 million in the U.S. for the first time in 2024 — and the internet blamed the vaccine. The actual evidence points somewhere else entirely. A rigorous look at what the data show about COVID-19 infection, mRNA vaccines, and the oncology trends that were already in motion before any of this started.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for The 'Turbo Cancer' Claim Is Wrong. But the Real Story Is More Unsettling.
